race.comment: CONFORMITY (14) has a win and two placings from just four starts to date with that win coming over this track and trip two back. Looks the runner in this field with the most upside and will prove hard to toss in this suitable race. RITUALIZE (6) strips fitter second-up from a lengthy spell and maps ideally for this from gate two. Definite top-three contender. JAGGERY (5) caught the eye late first up and has since been back to the trials. Rates well and shouldn't be far away. DARTH INVADER (7) failed to really fire first up when heavily supported. Clearly better than that and is worth another chance.
